name: rest-api-testing-suite
description: A professional SaaS dashboard for managing automated REST API testing.

scripts.test:api: newman run postman/REST-API-Testing.postman_collection.json -e postman/REST-API-Testing.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "REST API Testing Suite" --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "API Test Report" --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-report.xml
scripts.test:api:ci: newman run postman/REST-API-Testing.postman_collection.json -e postman/REST-API-Testing.postman_environment.json --env-var baseUrl=$BASE_URL -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "REST API Testing Suite" --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-report.xml
